---
title: "The Rev. M.M. ffinch"
---

## The Rev. M.M. ffinch

### Description

warden of Huggens College, Northfleet

### Biography

He acted as <i>locum tenens</i> for the Rev. Henry Bowles, Vicar of Otterbourne, during a holiday.  There is information about him and the college on the pages maintained by the Kent Archaeological Society at www.kentarchaeology.org.uk.

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 7th [1899]](../letters/3415_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Charlotte Fortescue Yonge, July 20, 1899](../letters/3411_To_Charlotte_Fortescue_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
